offer: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients, inaccurate tracking of asset depreciation causes compliance issues. We provide a fixed asset management platform instead of manual spreadsheets and outdated accounting software.
problem: Inaccurate tracking of asset depreciation and disposals leads to compliance issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting advice
Share insights on Indie Hackers forums
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Engage in community groups for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for asset details and depreciation tracking calculator on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with one-liner
Produce a short demo video of the platform
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing assets
